user_feedback: can you improve the UI, right now the player and enemy is too low, we can move tha tupwards, and the text for the defend and attacking isn't high enough, make sure the placement of every object is correct and increase the canvas size if needed
analysis:
- Issue identified: The canvas is too small (400px height) causing player/enemy entities to be positioned too low (y=250), and battle UI elements (cards at y=300-420) extend beyond the canvas. The intent text and combat visuals are cramped and not well-positioned.
- Files affected: globals.js, entities.js, combat_system.js, ui.js, index.html
- Changes needed: 
  1. Increase canvas height from 400 to 500px
  2. Move player and enemy entities higher (from y=250 to y=180)
  3. Reposition battle UI elements (cards, energy) to fit the new layout properly
  4. Ensure all text and visual elements have proper spacing and visibility
